title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Livspace - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Livspace - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Livspace family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Delhi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Livspace:
Livspace is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Livspace!
